address: 31 Sir Francis Drake Boulevard, Ross, CA 94957

fireAgency.name: Ross Valley Fire Department (RVFD)
fireAgency.address: 777 San Anselmo Avenue, San Anselmo, CA 94960
fireAgency.sprinklerRule: Substantial remodels do NOT trigger sprinkler retrofit in Ross (RVFD local rule). New SFR requires sprinklers per CRC R313.

codesAdopted.notes: Adopted 2025 California Building Standards Code (Title 24) effective January 1, 2026. Standard statewide adoption with minor local amendments per Title 15 RMC.

notableAmendments.description: Design review (ADRG + Town Council) required for most new construction, additions, and exterior changes
Hillside Lot Ordinance applies to lots with 30%+ slope or Slope Stability Hazard Zones 3/4; restricts FAR per formula
ADU/JADU fire sprinklers not required if primary dwelling does not require them
ADU exterior lighting must be dark sky compliant — shielded, downward-facing, 3,500K or lower color temp
Driveway required if exterior wall >150 ft from fire apparatus access road (12 ft wide, 13.5 ft clearance, turnaround at 150 ft)
New wood-burning devices must be EPA-certified or pellet-fueled per Bay Area Air Quality Management District rules
Restaurants are conditionally permitted in C-L zone only; use permit from Town Council required
